description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form factor and rounded corners. The front features a large, edge-to-edge display with minimal bezels, showing a digital clock interface with a red, white, and gray geometric wallpaper. The back is matte black and houses a vertically aligned triple camera array in the upper left corner. Physical buttons are visible along the right edge, including a prominent red button and a smaller black button, likely for power and volume control. The device appears to be constructed primarily from glass and metal, with a smooth, glossy finish on the front and a matte finish on the back. No external case or cover is present, and there are no visible brand logos.
description: A modern, black smartphone with a large edge-to-edge display, triple rear cameras, and side buttons. The device has a sleek, minimalist design with a glossy front and matte back.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the phone's slimness and the flat, rectangular shape with rounded corners.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the large screen with a digital clock and geometric wallpaper, as well as the minimal bezels.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile highlighting the thinness and the placement of side buttons, including a red accent button.
description_view_3: Rear view revealing the matte black back and the vertically aligned triple camera array in the upper left corner.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a digital clock reading '4:20' with a geometric wallpaper in red, white, and gray diagonal stripes. No app icons, notifications, or widgets are visible.
attribute_camera_placement: Three camera lenses are vertically aligned in the upper left corner on the back of the device, forming a triple camera array with no visible bump.
attribute_button_layout: There are two visible physical buttons on the right edge: a prominent red button (likely power) and a smaller black button (likely volume control) below it.
